item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Creamy Jerusalem artichoke-leek soup topped withsautéed leek, carrot, beluga lentils and chives with homemade sourdough bun

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Sfcincione – Sicilian white pizza with potato, onionand herbs. Topped with Italian herbs and truffle aioli

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: White beans prepared as a rustic cassoulet with roasted and sautéed broccoliniand pumpkin, finished with fresh lemon and parmesan

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Creamy mushroom pasta with sun dried tomatoes and fragrant pesto, tossed tocoat every bite

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Fried polenta with tomato creamy beans served with friedsweet potatoes topped with a fennel-herb salad tossed with yellow pickled beansand green oil
